title: MINIMAL
description: A Minecraft shader that only adds shadows
body:
![MINMIAL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/511752ec193b3dc2a5a40fdc19e72f71571c0bb3.png)

## Shader desinged for people that dont really like shaders, that is why it is so simple and wont effect any gameplay.

### all this shader does is adds shadows to minecraft.

![Before - After](https://files.catbox.moe/vr7ky0.webp)

## Features
- Shadows
- Distant Horizons Support
- Custom Settings
